steps.title: Identify the clause structures
steps.content: The blank separates a dependent clause starting with while from an independent clause beginning with the subject Howe.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule
steps.content:
When a dependent clause precedes an independent clause, a comma separates them.

The correct answer correctly uses a comma with no additional punctuation.

Those choices add a coordinating conjunction that shouldn't be there, and choice D lacks the required comma.

That confirms B is correct.
